description: Tracks product-building and design tool repositories from GitHub signals.

items.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90% on common dev commands. Single Rust binary, zero dependencies
Your platform team, as a service
一键将 Markdown 和网页 AI 对话（ChatGPT/DeepSeek等）完美粘贴到 Word、WPS 和 Excel 的效率工具 | One-click paste Markdown and AI responses (ChatGPT/DeepSeek) into Word, WPS, and Excel perfectly.
📊 A minimalist, self-hosted WakaTime-compatible backend for coding statistics
Terminal session manager for AI coding agents. One TUI for Claude, Gemini, OpenCode, Codex, and more.

NEO Emacs (WIP): A GPU-powered Emacs written in Rust with a modern display engine.  Aiming for modern design/multi-threaded Elisp, 10x performance and 100% Emacs compatibility. 🚀  Inline 4K images/4K videos/WPEWebKit using GPU acceleration, DMA-BUF, ZERO-COPY. Rich animation effects support.
Open-source context engine that catches AI hallucinations and cuts your token bill 70–95%. The only AI helper that shows its work. Claude · Cursor · Copilot · Codex,GPT & Custom Providers
Agentic coding TypeScript boilerplate for Claude Code — sub-agent workflows with built-in quality checks and context engineering.
🚀全新重构！AI论文阅读工具，一键截图AI翻译，支持数学公式，贴片截图，窗口锁定，归档管理
The Native Plain-Text Database for Obsidian. Build Tables, Kanban, and Slides with Zero Frontmatter.
A native study system for your Obsidian vault. LearnKit turns notes into durable knowledge with flashcards, spaced repetition, reviews, tests, and AI tools.
A terminal based project management solution

TaskView is a self-hosted project and task management platform focused on clarity, ownership, and control. TaskView is built for teams that want a transparent, self-hosted alternative to SaaS task managers.

Marking：现代化跨平台 Markdown 编辑器 - 专业级编辑体验 + 可视化表格编辑  + 强大导出功能 | Modern cross-platform Markdown editor with professional editing, visual table editor, and powerful export | MarKing: A modern, professional cross-platform Markdown editor with stunning UI, DOCX/PDF export, and native performance.
